title: nicotiana tabacum var. lancifolia
intro: Nicotiana tabacum var. lancifolia, also known as the lance-leaved tobacco plant, is a variety of the Nicotiana tabacum species, which is a flowering plant in the nightshade family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Nicotiana tabacum var. lancifolia include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation and respiratory health.
